# Config with SSH token expansion patterns

Host staging
    HostName staging.example.com
    User deploy
    IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_%h
    ControlPath /tmp/ssh-%h-%p-%r

Host production
    HostName prod.example.com
    User ops
    ProxyCommand ssh -W %h:%p gateway
    UserKnownHostsFile %d/.ssh/known_hosts_%h

Host *
    User default_user
